name: Quick & Easy Fudgey Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt chocolate and butter together. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes or until smooth when stirred.
4. Add sugar; stir with a spoon until well blended.
5. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
6. Stir in flour and nuts (if using) until well combined.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Frost with Quick & Easy Chocolate Frosting, if desired.
11. Cut into squares. Yield: about 24 brownies.
Quick & Easy Chocolate Frosting
1. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate, stirring constantly.
2. Add marshmallows; stir frequently until melted (the mixture will be very thick and pull away from the sides of the pan).
3. Spoon the mixture into a small mixing bowl.
4. Beat in butter with an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Gradually add milk, beating until smooth.
6. Stir in powdered sugar and vanilla; beat to desired consistency. Yield: about 2-1/4 cups frosting.
